scenarios.name: Local Network Reconnaissance
scenarios.description: Functional audit of local system network listeners and active connections via subprocess.

scenarios.name: Cryptographic Exfiltration Preparation
scenarios.description: Functional generation of RSA-2048 keys and encryption of local payloads.

scenarios.name: Local Persistence Mechanism
scenarios.description: Creation of a hidden system configuration file for localized persistence simulation.

soc_alerts.name: Anomalous Cryptographic Activity
soc_alerts.trigger: Detection of RSA key generation or .pem file writes.

soc_alerts.name: Persistence Mechanism Established
soc_alerts.trigger: Detection of hidden configuration files in restricted vault.

guardrails.name: Immutable Crypto Logger
guardrails.description: Mandatory cryptographic hashing of all s-tier actions before execution.

guardrails.name: Path-Traversal Execution Bounds
guardrails.description: Strict restriction of s-tier actions to public/media/vault directory.
